title: 信息日报 2026-07-18

headline.title: 新型“活塑料”6天内自我降解不产生微塑料
headline.summary: 研究人员利用工程改造的细菌制造出一种可自我降解的“活塑料”。材料在激活后6天内完全分解，不留下微塑料，为一次性塑料废物问题提供了潜在的解决方案。
headline.title_en: New 'living plastic' self-destructs in just 6 days without leaving microplastics
headline.summary_en: Researchers have created a self-destructing living plastic using engineered bacteria that degrades completely in six days without microplastics, offering a potential solution for single-use plastic waste.
headline.original_title: New “living plastic” self-destructs in just 6 days without leaving microplastics
headline.reason: 这是一项重大的环保科技突破，有望彻底改变塑料污染问题，具有全球影响力。
headline.reason_en: This is a major environmental tech breakthrough that could revolutionize plastic pollution, with global impact.
